notes: Think I got a cramp in my finger playing to write this report from all the clicking. Runs out of the box, no framedrops, everything works, no font glitches or anything. On first boot I got a crash after about 30 seconds of playing, but that hasn't happened again.
title: Hentai Mosaique Puzzle

notes: Lags a little if there are a lot of tiles and a lot of moving stars. Zooming in usually fixes this. Game can be 100% completed with Proton
title: Hentai Mosaique Puzzle

notes: Unlocked all achievements, Steam Controller can be set to use the WASD and Mouse config and it'll work with the game (though you probably won't want to do this). Framedrops when lots of tiles are on screen but that could just be an issue with the game. Doesn't take away from the experience. Perfect compatibility!
title: Hentai Mosaique Puzzle
